title: stelis elongata
intro: Stelis elongata is a type of orchid, specifically a species of epiphyte native to Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and easing congestion. In herbal preparations, Stelis elongata is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
